creator: avangardeena@gmail.com
text:
Hello! I have some problem in the k3b 1.0 program.
I have a two devices- Asus CD-ROM 52x and _NEC DVD_RW device
first device is /dev/acd1 and second /dev/acd0

If I running k3b as user it proggam tell me about bug- "not found DVD-RW device"
In options->devices I see what CD and DVD device tree are empty.
If I run such as root I has it problem too. Devices tree is empty.
I made chmod 777 to /dev/acd1 and /dev/acd0, but it not give me good resoult, tree also empty.

I couldn't find document about fix this problem. Why DVD and CD device couldn't work in k3b? only k3b, because discs mounted very good?

Thank you :)

Fix: 

I down't know
How-To-Repeat: always
